sales.description:
THEOPHILUS, 829-842. AV Solidus (4.37 gms), Constantinople Mint, 830/1-840. NGC Ch VF, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 3/5. Marks.
To view all items from the Peter Jones M.D. Collection, click  here.
S-1653. Obverse: Crowned facing bust of Theophilus, wearing chlamys, holding patriarchal cross and akakia; Reverse: Crowned facing busts of Michael and Constantine, both wearing chlamys; cross above.

From the Peter Jones M.D. Collection. 

Ex: Numismatica Ars Classica 106 (5/2018) Lot # 1746.
